title: Hide Field Selection Dropdown When Aggregation Is Applied
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the field selection to be hidden when I apply an aggregation, so that the UI reflects the aggregated context and avoids confusion.
description: When a user applies an aggregation (SUM, COUNT, AVG), the query context shifts from row-level data to aggregated data. The field selection dropdown should be hidden or disabled at that point to avoid confusing the user with row-level field options that don't apply in an aggregated context.
acceptance_criteria: Field selection dropdown is hidden when an aggregation is applied
Field selection reappears when aggregation is removed
ux_changes: Field selection dropdown hidden/disabled when aggregation functions are active.
implementation_notes: Waqar asked for clarification on whether to hide just the select column or the complete expander. Currently in progress.
comment_summary: Waqar asked for clarification on exact scope of hiding — select column only vs. complete expander.
